mapper.insert: insert into graph_relations ( src_id, edge_type, dst_id, source_ref, source_start_line, source_end_line, confidence, extractor, asserted_at, superseded_by, tombstoned ) values ( #{relation.srcId}, #{relation.edgeType}, #{relation.dstId}, #{relation.sourceRef}, #{relation.sourceStartLine}, #{relation.sourceEndLine}, #{relation.confidence}, #{relation.extractor}, current_timestamp, null, false )
